name: The Clearing Ground
descriptionSeed: Where things are brought to be ended properly — a failing institution, a life's work that has become a cage, a war. The Unmakers end it, honor it, and make sure what comes after is not poisoned by how it went. It is a genuine mercy and almost nobody thanks them.
encounterFlavor: Clearers who treat an ending with more respect than most people treat a life; a thing being ended well; someone who has brought their own work here and cannot let go of it.
questSeeds: Someone has brought a PERSON to the Clearing Ground
A war has been brought here to be ended, and both sides came, and they are in the same room
